Remove.bg

Instant AI-powered background removal for any image

8/10Overall Rating
10/10Ease of Use
FreeStarting Price
2018Founded
Free Plan Available

About Remove.bg

Remove.bg is a ai image generation platform founded in 2018. It positions itself as “Instant AI-powered background removal for any image” and is best suited for background removal, product photos, portraits, quick edits. Pricing starts at Free, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Text To ImageNo
Image To ImageYes
InpaintingNo
OutpaintingNo
UpscalingNo
Style TransferNo
Batch GenerationYes
Api AccessYes
Commercial LicenseYes
Custom ModelsNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Best background removal accuracy available
  • Instant results, no configuration needed
  • API for bulk processing

Cons

  • Only does one thing: background removal
  • Free plan gives low resolution output
  • Expensive per-image pricing for high-res
